text:
Owner-curated House of Bound tutorial resource
The supplied directory recommends Lief Bound's purchasable rope tutorials at https://www.houseofbound.com/tutorials.
The inspected public page directs buyers to the House of Bound Etsy shop and says purchased videos are shared through Vimeo for continued access. Visible titles include Lief's Hug Harness, Lief's Booty Basket, Lief's Booty Basket Attachment Methods, Lief's Half Mermaid, Lief's Calf Binder, Lief's Ballerina Boot, Lief's Arms Free Chest Harness, and Lief's Rope Conditioning Tutorial.
title: Owner-curated House of Bound tutorial resource
